records.name: profitslocal.com
records.note: Use this for subdomains such as www.example.com or menu.example.com.

records.name: www.profitslocal.com
records.note: Use this when the customer wants www on the root brand domain.

instructions.customerMessage:
Point profitslocal.com to the preview/live site.
If DNS is on Cloudflare, add CNAME profitslocal.com -> profitslocal-live.pages.dev. Cloudflare will flatten the root CNAME.
If DNS is not on Cloudflare, use www.profitslocal.com CNAME profitslocal-live.pages.dev, then redirect the root domain to www.profitslocal.com.
After DNS propagates, WebJuice can attach the custom domain in Cloudflare Pages.
